result:
All 5 clarifications are recorded and integrated. Final validation passed — the `## Clarifications` section has exactly 5 bullets (one per answer), no contradictory prior text remains, and each answer is reflected in the relevant requirement.

## Clarification session complete

- **Questions asked & answered**: 5 / 5
- **Updated spec**: `specs/001-compound-strength-app/spec.md`
- **Sections touched**: Clarifications (new), Functional Requirements (FR-006a, FR-011a, FR-016, FR-019, FR-022 added/expanded), Success Criteria (SC-004)

### Decisions captured

| # | Topic | Resolution |
|---|-------|-----------|
| Q1 | Weight rounding | Round to nearest **inventory-loadable** increment (not fixed 5 lb) |
| Q2 | Canonical program variants | Community-standard: nSuns 9-set LP, GZCLP (Lefever base), 5/3/1 Wendler 2nd ed.+BBB, Madcow standard, Metallicadpa PPL |
| Q3 | Starting-number seeding | Normalize to e1RM; TM = 90% for 5/3/1 & nSuns, conservative working-weight start for linear |
| Q4 | Days vs. program cadence | Program cadence governs; manual choice keeps canonical structure (PPL stays 6-day) |
| Q5 | Warm-up ramp | Deterministic %-ladder (bar→40→60→80%), plate-rounded, skip threshold for light weights |

### Coverage summary

| Category | Status |
|----------|--------|
| Domain & Data Model (program variants, seeding) | **Resolved** |
| Constraints & Tradeoffs (rounding granularity) | **Resolved** |
| Functional Scope (days↔cadence reconciliation) | **Resolved** |
| Completion Signals (warm-up determinism / testability) | **Resolved** |
| Functional Scope & Behavior (core loop, non-goals) | Clear |
| Interaction & UX Flow (onboarding, logging, resilience) | Clear |
| Edge Cases & Failure Handling | Clear |
| Non-Functional (offline, single-user, no-runtime scope) | Clear |
| Security/Privacy, Integration, Observability | Clear (offline single-user — N/A by design) |

No Outstanding or Deferred items. The remaining open points are genuine plan-level execution details (exact module boundaries, test framework wiring), appropriate for the next phase.

**Suggested next command**: `/speckit-plan`

One optional housekeeping note: the Q2 canonical-source pins (especially nSuns/GZCLP) are exactly the kind of non-obvious decision worth a project memory so the plan/tasks/implement phases stay consistent. Want me to save that?
